tweets.author: cryptofox.news
tweets.text: BlackRock's BITA Bitcoin Yield ETF under fire! 🚨 10x Research warns its call option strategy might underperform spot BTC long-term due to fixed monthly execution. They suggest a "timing and conditional execution" approach for better returns. #Bitcoin #ETF #Crypto
